---
name: Godot Acceptance Criteria First Rule
description: Use when implementing medium or large tasks, feature requests, or behavior changes to define clear acceptance criteria before coding.
---
# Godot Acceptance Criteria First Rule

## Cross-References
- Refer to `godot-expert-workflow.instructions.md` and applicable scoped companion instructions for precedence and details.

## Rule
- For medium or large tasks, define acceptance criteria before implementation.
- Keep criteria testable, observable, and tied to concrete outcomes.

## Required Fields
- Functional outcome expected by the user.
- Required integration behavior in scene and script flow.
- One edge-case expectation.
- One non-goal to avoid scope creep.

## Output Requirement
- When acceptance criteria are missing from prompt context, state assumed criteria briefly before coding.
